title: Spiritborne RPG
description: RPG contents, inspired by POE and more - Introduces a new curio slot : Spirit slot!
body:
**Description** ## 🔮 Spirits of Power - Introduces a New Curio Slot **Spirits of Power** introduces a brand new Curios slot to your Minecraft adventures, the **Spirit slot!** - This mod adds a collection of unique spirit items that modify the player’s attributes based on the spirit's type. Some spirits also grant passive or active abilities. - A mechanic where unequipping a spirit applies debuffs and triggers a short cooldown before it can be re-equipped. - 🔍Spirits can be obtained from the Mystic Spirit Relic, a very rare item found in structure loot chests throughout the world! (Can be disabled in Config) ![Mystic Spirit in loot chest](https://media1.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExMnoxMDNjOXRyYXAyZnVleW43cnQzbzF6Y2JzempzNHA4aXgzcng4OCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/YPMyDEUSrSufELBwDQ/giphy.gif) **CHECK OUT MY NEW MOD** [Spiritborne Ascendants](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiritborne-ascendants) [Riftbound Jewelry](https://modrinth.com/mod/riftbound-jewelry) --- ## 🧿 Mystic Spirit Relic The Mystic Spirit Relic is a very rare item that can be found in loot chests. When right-clicked, it reveals its Spirit Potential (1–100%) and assigns a unique task. Completing the task allows you to claim a mysterious spirit as a reward. The task can only be performed when the relic is held in the offhand. _[See spoiler for further details]_
Spoiler To awaken the Mystic Spirit Relic, you must complete one of the following tasks randomly assigned by the relic : - Slay 25 - 50 Hostile Mobs : Defeat the required amount of hostile mobs to fulfill the task. [Example image] ![Mystic Spirit Relic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93d84507fab89c51bd0fb596a9c68dd78408cfd3.png) - Feed 125 - 250 experience points : Whenever you pick up an experience orb, it will be consumed by the relic instead of being added to your experience bar. [Example image] ![Mystic Spirit Relic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9970378e0da4b8cc86e81048aa3e6b8b945b00d.png) Note : Tasks only progress while the relic is held in your offhand.
--- ### **👻 Current Spirits** - Paladin's Spirit - Warrior's Spirit - Assassin's Spirit - Vampire's Spirit - Berserker's Spirit (Reworked in v0.9.5) - Wizard's Spirit (v0.6.0) - Butcher's Spirit (v0.7.0) - Cowboy's Spirit (v0.8.0) - Bard's Spirit (New v0.9.0) - Rogue's Spirit (New v1.2.0) - (More spirits coming soon! Ranger, Elementalist, Reaper, Gambler, Necromancer, Sharpshooter) Feel free to leave a comment with your spirit ideas. **Bard's Spirit**
Spoiler ![Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bF0lIVMG/images/ba022b2c488f2ce0a5a7a8b9e128c3d951017945.png)
**Cowboy's Spirit**
Spoiler ![Cowboy's Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bF0lIVMG/images/50b2aebd3a23079fff3213fefc15c29427da16ab.png)
**Wizard's Spirit**
Spoiler > _Wizard's Sprit required **[Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)** mod_ ![Wizard's Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bF0lIVMG/images/e2f6793ed37e8ee1fdf2cdc7d4932dafca2e69e4.png)
**Butcher's Spirit**
Spoiler ![Butcher's Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bF0lIVMG/images/ab3f0d4d35287a76ee6f503e209851f5900e2db4.png)
**Paladin's Spirit**
Spoiler ![Paladin's Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bF0lIVMG/images/5e28ff593e97f191e7fb70927b42f297ceef2893.png)
**Assassin's Spirit**
Spoiler ![Assassin's Spirit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bF0lIVMG/images/cd0cf6749c9f25a686f97620ea0d53125029a545.png)
_**Every Spirit details can be found in Gallery**_ --- ## ✨ Spirit Potential
Spoiler Every Spirit item now possesses a Potential value, ranging from 1% to 100%. This value directly influences your luck when rolling for Modifier Quality that affect the strength of each modifier in your Spirit Modifiers. Potential is typically defined by right-clicking a Mystic Spirit Relic. The relic rolls a random value between 1-100%. Once you complete the required task, you will receive a random Spirit with that specific Potential value assigned to it. Rerolling potential to a new value is possible by using a Shard of Hubris. More details of this item can be found in the Items section further down this page.
## ⚒️ Spirit Modifiers & Modifier Quality
Spoiler Every Spirit item comes with a unique set of positive and negative attributes. Modifiers displayed with a percentage in the tooltip are Dynamic Modifiers. These have a Modifier Quality value ranging from 0% to 100%, which determines the actual strength of that attribute. Each modifier has a specific value range. The Quality determines where your roll lands within that range. Example : - Warrior’s Spirit on v1.0.0 has increased Max Health modifier range of 5% to 10%.            > 0% Quality = 5% increased Max Health           > 100% Quality = 10% increased Max Health   When you first obtain a Spirit item, you must right-click to awaken it. The Quality of each dynamic attribute is randomly rolled, but your odds are significantly influenced by the Spirit Potential, because higher Potential means a better chance at hitting 100% Quality. Rerolling quality to a new value is possible by using a Entropy Shard. More details of this item can be found in the Items section further down this page.
## **⭐ Spirit Empowerment**
Spoiler

Every spirits can be empowered using the Empowered Orb. Empowerment usually increases modifier stats, strengthens existing abilities or both, depending on that Spirit.

Empowered Orb can be crafted by the following recipe :

"The Spirits shown in the Gallery are in their Empowered form. the unempowered forms are much weaker."

### 🔧 **Required Dependencies** - [Spiritborne Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/spiritborne-core) - [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) - [Apothic Attributes (AttributesLib)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes) - _Unavalible in Modrinth_ ### 🔧 **Optional Compatibilities** - [Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll) : Some spirits use attributes from this mod. If it's not installed, those attributes won't apply or appear in tooltips. - [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) : Wizard's Sprit required this mod. Some spirits use attributes from this mod. If it's not installed, those attributes won't apply or appear in tooltips. - [Mine and Slash](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-and-slash) : All spirit modifiers and most abilities have been reworked to fit with the mod. See spoiler for more details.
Spoiler If Mine and Slash and Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks are both installed, the mod will always use the Mine and Slash version of the spirit, ignoring the Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks compat. Full details of every spirit with Mine and Slash compatibility ![Mine and Slash Spirits](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1282/41/mine-and-slash-spirit-png.png)
### 🔧 **Recommended Mods** - [Just Enough Effect Descriptions (JEED)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) : Allows players to view detailed descriptions of effects. Fully compatible with this mod. > This mod is also available in [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spiritborne-rpg)
